title: Create: Legends of Steam
description: Create: Legends of Steam is a SMP focused Create Modpack, which specializes primarily on Trains and Automation.
body:
![This is the banner of Create: Legends of Steam. The ingame screenshot was taken in a maple forest with a train in the background and some Create Stuff in the foreground.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd53f6ef465dea4ec5d2970757a083fdc479326d.webp)

## 🔧✨ *Create SMP: Legends of Steam*

**A world of gears, grit, and grand engineering.**

Welcome to a Minecraft experience where automation isn’t just a feature — it’s a philosophy. *Create SMP: Legends of Steam* blends the immersive mechanics of the Create ecosystem with epic exploration and modular multiplayer adventures.

### 🚂 **Build Your Industrial Empire**

The heart of this modpack is **Create** — and it's beating harder than ever. Design complex factories, construct steam-powered machines, or automate entire farms with mechanical precision. From water wheels to kinetic contraptions, every gear you place is part of a bigger story.

### 🌍 **Explore, Conquer, Reclaim**

Delve into **YUNG’s Better Structures** – revamped dungeons, strongholds, and monuments await, filled with danger and treasure alike. Traverse lush landscapes overhauled by *Regions Unexplored*, discovering the perfect biome for your next megaproject.

### 🚉 **Steam Meets Steel: Railways Reimagined**

Thanks to **Create: Steam ‘n’ Rails** and **Create: Copycats+**, your locomotives aren’t just functional — they’re beautiful. Design intricate trains with modular components and custom blocks, then take it a step further with **Create Railways Navigator**: build an expansive, interconnected train network complete with **real-time signage**, **line names**, and **dynamic routing**.

### 🥘 **The Taste of Automation**

Farming isn’t just wheat anymore. With **Farmer’s Delight** and **Create: Food**, you’ll be cooking (and automating) everything from hearty stews to gourmet meals — especially when paired with **Create: Slice ‘n’ Dice** for full auto-chef power.

### 🧳 **Adventure-Ready Utility**

Pack smart with **Traveler’s Backpack**, survive your mistakes with **Gravestone**, and stay connected with **Simple Voice Chat**.

### 💰 **A Currency Powered by Gears**

With **Create: Numismatics**, money becomes more than just a means of trade — it becomes a fully automatable part of your world. Set up ticket machines for your luxury first-class trains, build vending systems, or run your own industrial bank. Every player has a secure account to keep their wealth safe from prying hands. Low on funds? Complete **weekly missions** to earn cash and feed the piggy bank, one gear-driven quest at a time.

---

**Create SMP: Legends of Steam** is not just a modpack — it’s a sandbox of innovation, a world of steampunk creativity, and a living map of stories powered by gears and imagination.

**So grab your wrench, load the boiler, and let the steam rise.**
This isn’t just Minecraft.
This is *Legends of Steam*.
